message:
fix(swarm): empty DefaultAgentArgs so bare shell aliases launch correctly

PaneLauncher was appending hardcoded args that were wrong for all
three agent types: cc got dispatched to GCC, cod got --quiet
(invalid), gmi got --non-interactive (invalid). The shell
functions/wrappers already handle the correct flags, so sending
bare aliases with no args is both simpler and correct.

Closes #96

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,7 +108,7 @@ func TestPaneLaunchResult(t *testing.T) {
 		PaneTarget:  "test-session:1.1",
 		AgentType:   "cc",
 		Project:     "/projects/foo",
-		Command:     "cc --dangerously-skip-permissions",
+		Command:     "cc",
 		Success:     true,
 		Duration:    100 * time.Millisecond,
 	}
